details.note: SubagentPhaseChanged BusEvent definition (coord.subagent.phase) with session_id, tool_call_id, tool_name, phase, description, changed_at fields
Phase event publishing helpers: publishStarted, publishCompleted, publishFailed wrapping bus.publish(CoordEvents.SubagentPhaseChanged, ...)

Added Bus.Service dependency, Execution.publishStarted/before tool execute, Effect.catch with Execution.publishFailed on error, Execution.publishCompleted after tool execute — both for built-in and MCP tool paths
